name: Low-Fat Sweet Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the oat flour blend, ground cardamom or cinnamon, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Rub the cold butter into the dry ingredients using your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles small peas.
3. Stir in the canola oil with a fork.
4. Gradually add the very cold water, 1 tablespoon at a time, tossing with a fork until the dough is moistened but not wet.
5. Gather the dough and shape it into a flattened round. Let rest for about 15 minutes.
6. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to an 8-inch diameter or roll between sheets of wax paper.
7. Carefully lift the rolled dough and press it into a 9-inch square tart pan with a removable bottom.
8. Trim off excess dough from the edges.
9. Bake at 425 degrees F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Makes 12 servings. NOTE: Unsalted butter will give a more delicate fresh flavor in this pastry. Add a dash of salt if using.
